programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's the grand finale of 2013 and our top 22 has been whittled down to three home cooks battling it out.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Auditions
programme.desc: The hit local cooking competition is back, bigger and better than ever before.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Whole Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face a sudden death challenge to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Loaf
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Takeaways
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook three classic takeaway dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Navy
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants make canapés for 130 guests on board the HMNZS Canterbury.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Moo Chow Chow
programme.desc: The Top 13 face their spiciest challenge yet: to cook two dishes for guest chef Che Barrington.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - La Cigale
programme.desc: A Mystery Box Challenge has the cooks baking from the heart.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #1
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Frozen, Canned & Packaged
programme.desc: The remaining cooks compete in teams for a gourmet sausage challenge in celebration of Oktoberfest.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #2
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh, Simon and Ray cook three simple but tasty dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Hawkes Bay
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants travel to Hawkes Bay for an invention test using spring lamb and fresh local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #3
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Cake
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants make a hamburger cake and a milkshake for baking maestro Mathew Metcalfe

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #4
programme.desc: Guest chef Mathew Metcalfe joins Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie to make three delectable desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Young Guns
programme.desc: The top seven contestants cook fine dining dishes for three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #5
programme.desc: Guest chef Nick Honeyman cooks three very different examples of modern New Zealand cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Huka Lodge
programme.desc: The top six contestants cook a course each from the gourmet dinner menu at iconic Huka Lodge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #6
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws from Huka Lodge joins Josh Emett and Simon Gault to cook three hearty meat dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Dessert
programme.desc: The top five contestants must replicate a challenging dessert created by award-winning chef, Michael Meredith.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #7
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook their favourite desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Business Class
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants cook Business Class in-flight meals for Jetstar.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #8
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three different cuts of beef.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Singapore
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants face two epic challenges in the culinary capital of Asia, Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #9
programme.desc: Street food master K.F. Seetoh and Eric Bost, join Ray McVinnie for a Masterclass in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The three semi-finalists try to impress cookbook queen Annabel Langbein.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #10
programme.desc: In the last Masterclass of the Season, the judge give us a taster of their signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Final
programme.desc: The final two contestants take on four challenges in their bid to become New Zealand's next MasterChef.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (19 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (20 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP1
programme.desc: The Top 50 assemble at Carriageworks for their first Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP3
programme.desc: The Bottom 10 are paired up and sent on a food fossicking Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP4
programme.desc: The remaining contestants face 2 challenges for 10 spots in the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP5
programme.desc: All contestants assemble for a Masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP6
programme.desc: It's the final challenge of the top 50 week, the last chance to gain a place in the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - Episode
programme.desc: The top 24 all get their own MasterChef aprons and knives and are ready to get into the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP8
programme.desc: Alvin cooks off against Celebrity Chef Luke Ngyuen in a slightly different twist to a Celeb Chef Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP9
programme.desc: The Contestants prepare for their first Offsite Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP10
programme.desc: The Red Team head off for their reward lunch at Glass Restaurant with Luke Mangan.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP11
programme.desc: The contestants assemble at the MCK and are taught by Gary & George.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP12
programme.desc: The Contestants have 45 minutes to create their own Gourmet burger.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP13
programme.desc: Pressure Test. Bottom 3 Kate, Carrie & Fiona face the Pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP14
programme.desc: Celeb Chef Challenge - Callum as winner of Japanese Challenge faces Celeb Chef Phillipa Sibley.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP15
programme.desc: Contestants pick teams again, Callum is the Blue team Captain and gets to choose his opposing captain.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP16
programme.desc: The Blue Team head off for their reward lunch at Sails at Lavender Bay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP17
programme.desc: The remaining contestants assemble at the MCK and are taught by Gary & George.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP18
programme.desc: The Contestants have 45 minutes to create their own duck dish, only the top 5 are tasted.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP19
programme.desc: Pressure Test. Bottom 3 Dominic, Joanne & Matthew face the Pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP20
programme.desc: Celeb Chef Challenge - Jonathon as winner of Indian Invention Challenge faces Celeb Chef Justin North.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP21
programme.desc: Jonathon as the Blue team Captain chooses Daniel as the Red captain.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP22
programme.desc: The Red team will all be facing a basic skills test elimination challenge that is all about herbs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP23
programme.desc: The contestants assemble at the MCK and are taught by Gary & George and guest chef Kumar Mahadevan.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP25
programme.desc: Pressure Test. Bottom 3 Daniel, Fiona & Alvin face the Pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP26
programme.desc: Aaron, Joanne, & Matthew will face a trio of Chefs from Arras Restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP27
programme.desc: It's team challenge time and Aaron, Joanne and Matthew have to choose a captain out of the three of them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP28
programme.desc: Carrie, Jonathon, Callum & Phillip face the elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 02 - EP29
programme.desc: The contestants assemble at the MCK and are taught by Gary & George.
